name: model-scope
description: Build a self-contained, schema-driven GUI that visualises any parameterised stochastic/dynamical model trial-by-trial (trajectory → accumulating histogram), with sliders for every parameter and optional 2-D phase-plane + energy-landscape views. Generalises the Bogacz et al. (2006) decision-model simulator pattern to any model — decision, random walk, population/epidemic, neural competition, Monte-Carlo, …
